[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=68.0", "setuptools-scm>=8.0"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "zh-copilot"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "AI bot for C&C Generals Zero Hour"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = [
    "torch>=2.0",
    "numpy>=1.24",
    "h5py>=3.8",
    "pyarrow>=12.0",
    "pyyaml>=6.0",
    "tqdm>=4.65",
    "scikit-learn>=1.3",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=7.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.0",
    "ruff>=0.1.0",
    "pre-commit>=3.0",
    "mypy>=1.0",
]
deploy = [
    "ultralytics>=8.0",
    "pyautogui>=0.9",
    "pytesseract>=0.3",
    "opencv-python>=4.8",
    "mss>=9.0",
]
rl = [
    "tensorboard>=2.14",
    "pyzmq>=25.0",
]

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]

content.content:
1	# ZH-Copilot: AI Bot for C&C Generals Zero Hour
2	
3	**Date:** 2026-03-30
4	**Status:** Design approved, pending implementation plan
5	
6	---
7	
8	## 1. Overview
9	
10	ZH-Copilot is an AI bot that plays Command & Conquer: Generals Zero Hour at a competitive level. It operates in two modes:
11	
12	- **Autopilot:** Bot plays fully autonomously. Human starts the game and hands off control.
13	- **Copilot:** Bot plays, human provides strategic guidance via UI buttons (Attack, Defend, Rush, Farm, Turtle, Auto).
14	
15	**Target:** 70%+ win rate against good-to-top human players. All three factions (USA, China, GLA). All official maps.
16	
17	**Deployment:** Screen capture + keyboard/mouse emulation. No game modification required.
18	
19	**Training:** Direct engine integration via headless build of the open-source EA codebase.
20	
21	---
22	
23	## 2. System Architecture
24	
25	```
26	в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
27	в”Ӯ                   ZH-COPILOT                        в”Ӯ
28	в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ
29	в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
30	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Replay   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Headless в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Screen       в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
31	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Parser   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Engine   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Capture      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
32	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (Python) в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (C++)    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Interface    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
33	в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
34	в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ                 в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
35	в”Ӯ        в–ј              в–ј                 в–ј           в”Ӯ
36	в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ
37	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ         Game State Abstraction Layer         в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
38	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    (Unified representation for all inputs)   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
39	в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
40	в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
41	в”Ӯ                         в–ј                           в”Ӯ
42	в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ
43	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ              AI Model (PyTorch)              в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
44	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
45	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮStrategy в”Ӯ в”ӮCustomв”Ӯ в”ӮEntityв”Ӯ в”ӮTemporal в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
46	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮEncoder  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ CNN  в”Ӯ в”ӮTrans.в”Ӯ в”ӮLSTM    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
47	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
48	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ        в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
49	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
50	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ              Action Decoder                  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
51	в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
52	в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
53	в”Ӯ                         в–ј                           в”Ӯ
54	в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ

57	в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Deploy:   keyboard/mouse emulation          в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
58	в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
59	в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

file.content:
# ZH-Copilot: AI Bot for C&C Generals Zero Hour

**Date:** 2026-03-30
**Status:** Design approved, pending implementation plan

---

## 1. Overview

ZH-Copilot is an AI bot that plays Command & Conquer: Generals Zero Hour at a competitive level. It operates in two modes:

- **Autopilot:** Bot plays fully autonomously. Human starts the game and hands off control.
- **Copilot:** Bot plays, human provides strategic guidance via UI buttons (Attack, Defend, Rush, Farm, Turtle, Auto).

**Target:** 70%+ win rate against good-to-top human players. All three factions (USA, China, GLA). All official maps.

**Deployment:** Screen capture + keyboard/mouse emulation. No game modification required.

**Training:** Direct engine integration via headless build of the open-source EA codebase.

---

## 2. System Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                   ZH-COPILOT                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Replay   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Headless в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Screen       в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Parser   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Engine   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Capture      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (Python) в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  (C++)    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Interface    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ                 в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        в–ј              в–ј                 в–ј           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ         Game State Abstraction Layer         в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    (Unified representation for all inputs)   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                         в–ј                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ              AI Model (PyTorch)              в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮStrategy в”Ӯ в”ӮCustomв”Ӯ в”ӮEntityв”Ӯ в”ӮTemporal в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮEncoder  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ CNN  в”Ӯ в”ӮTrans.в”Ӯ в”ӮLSTM    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ        в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ              Action Decoder                  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                         в–ј                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

content.content:
1	# Plan 0: Project Setup
2	
3	> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
4	
5	**Goal:** Initialize the zh-copilot repository with Python/C++ project structure, dependencies, and development environment ready for all subsequent plans.
6

# Plan 0: Project Setup

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Initialize the zh-copilot repository with Python/C++ project structure, dependencies, and development environment ready for all subsequent plans.

**Architecture:** Monorepo with Python (PyTorch ML code) and C++ (game interface layer). Python is the primary language. C++ is limited to pybind11 bindings and engine interaction. Source code for the original game engine lives in `cczh-source-code/` as read-only reference.

**Tech Stack:** Python 3.11+, PyTorch 2.x, pybind11, CMake, pytest, pre-commit

---

## File Structure

в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ __init__.py
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ game_state.py       # Unified state dataclasses
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ model/                  # PyTorch model
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ __init__.py

1	"""Global configuration and hyperparameters for ZH-Copilot."""
2	
3	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
4	
5	
6	@dataclass(frozen=True)
7	class EngineConfig:
8	    """Constants from the ZH game engine."""
9	
10	    logic_fps: int = 30
11	    msec_per_tick: float = 1000.0 / 30  # ~33.33ms
12	    max_players: int = 8  # engine supports 16, we use 8 max
13	    max_generals: int = 9
14	
15	
16	@dataclass(frozen=True)
17	class AgentConfig:
18	    """AI agent decision-making parameters."""
19	
20	    decisions_per_second: int = 3
21	    ticks_per_decision: int = 10  # 30 fps / 3 decisions = 10 ticks
22	    decision_interval_ms: float = 1000.0 / 3  # ~333ms
23	    max_actions_per_step: int = 3
24	
25	
26	@dataclass(frozen=True)
27	class StateConfig:
28	    """Game state representation parameters."""
29

32	    max_entities: int = 1024
33	    entity_feature_dim: int = 32

36	
37

45	    cnn_output_dim: int = 256
46	
47	    # Transformer (entity encoder)

file.content:
"""Global configuration and hyperparameters for ZH-Copilot."""

from dataclasses import dataclass, field


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class EngineConfig:
    """Constants from the ZH game engine."""

    logic_fps: int = 30
    msec_per_tick: float = 1000.0 / 30  # ~33.33ms
    max_players: int = 8  # engine supports 16, we use 8 max
    max_generals: int = 9


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentConfig:
    """AI agent decision-making parameters."""

    decisions_per_second: int = 3
    ticks_per_decision: int = 10  # 30 fps / 3 decisions = 10 ticks
    decision_interval_ms: float = 1000.0 / 3  # ~333ms
    max_actions_per_step: int = 3


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class StateConfig:
    """Game state representation parameters."""

    spatial_resolution: int = 128
    spatial_channels: int = 40  # scales with max_players
    max_entities: int = 1024
    entity_feature_dim: int = 32
    global_scalar_dim: int = 80
    num_strategy_buttons: int = 6  # Attack, Defend, Rush, Farm, Turtle, Auto


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ModelConfig:
    """Neural network architecture parameters."""

    # Custom CNN (spatial encoder)
    cnn_blocks: int = 6
    cnn_base_channels: int = 32
    cnn_output_dim: int = 256

    # Transformer (entity encoder)
    transformer_layers: int = 8
    transformer_heads: int = 8
    transformer_dim: int = 256

    # Global MLP
    global_mlp_hidden: int = 128

    # Fusion + LSTM
    fusion_dim: int = 512
    lstm_hidden: int = 512

    # Strategy encoder
    strategy_dim: int = 64
    num_strategy_archetypes: int = 20

    # Action space
    num_action_types: int = 21
    spatial_action_resolution: int = 64

    # Value head
    value_hidden: int = 256


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TrainingConfig:
    """Training hyperparameters."""

    # Imitation learning
    il_batch_size: int = 256
    il_learning_rate: float = 1e-4
    il_epochs: int = 50

    # RL (PPO)
    ppo_batch_size: int = 2048
    ppo_learning_rate: float = 3e-4
    ppo_clip_range: float = 0.2
    ppo_epochs: int = 4
    ppo_gamma: float = 0.99
    ppo_gae_lambda: float = 0.95
    ppo_entropy_coeff: float = 0.01
    ppo_value_coeff: float = 0.5

    # Reward shaping weights (Phase 2)
    reward_win: float = 1.0
    reward_resources: float = 0.01
    reward_kills: float = 0.05
    reward_losses: float = -0.03
    reward_map_control: float = 0.02
    reward_tech: float = 0.01


@dataclass
class GameModeConfig:
    """Supported game modes."""

    mode: str = "1v1"  # 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, 4v4, ffa
    num_players: int = 2
    factions: list[str] = field(default_factory=lambda: ["usa", "china", "gla"])


# Default configs
ENGINE = EngineConfig()
AGENT = AgentConfig()
STATE = StateConfig()
MODEL = ModelConfig()
TRAINING = TrainingConfig()

content.text: Now I have enough to write a solid CLAUDE.md.

input.content:
# ZH-Copilot вҖ” CLAUDE.md

## Project

AI bot for C&C Generals Zero Hour. Two modes: **Autopilot** (full autonomous play) and **Copilot** (bot plays, human guides via strategy buttons). Target: 70%+ win rate vs good humans. All three factions (USA, China, GLA).

Deployment: screen capture + keyboard/mouse emulation. No game modification.

---

## Repo Layout

```
zh-copilot/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/zh_copilot/         # Python package (primary language)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ config.py           # Frozen dataclass configs вҖ” single source of truth
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ state/              # Game state abstraction (GameState dataclasses)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ model/              # PyTorch model (CNN + Transformer + LSTM + decoders)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ training/           # IL and RL training pipelines
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ replay/             # .rep file parser + analysis
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/               # Downloader, index, scraper (GameReplays.org)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ engine/             # Python side of headless engine interface (Phase 1)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ deploy/             # Screen capture + input emulation (Phase 6)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/cpp/                # C++ pybind11 bindings ONLY вҖ” minimal C++
в”ңв”Җв”Җ cczh-source-code/       # EA source code вҖ” READ-ONLY reference, never modify
в”ңв”Җв”Җ tests/                  # pytest
в”ңв”Җв”Җ docs/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ specs/              # Design docs (.md)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ diagrams/           # Architecture diagrams (.md, ASCII or Mermaid)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ source-code/        # EA source analysis notes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ plans/                  # Per-phase implementation plans (plan-N-*.md)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ IMPLEMENTATION.md   # Master checklist вҖ” update checkboxes as work completes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ conversations/          # Session logs / research notes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ feedback/               # Retrospectives
в”ңв”Җв”Җ scripts/                # Shell helpers
в””в”Җв”Җ data/                   # Downloaded replays, datasets (gitignored)
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Tech |
|-------|------|
| ML / training | Python 3.11+, PyTorch 2.x |
| Data processing | numpy, h5py, pyarrow, scikit-learn |
| Web scraping | Playwright (async), aiohttp |
| C++ interface | pybind11, CMake |
| Deploy (Phase 6) | ultralytics/YOLOv8, opencv, pytesseract, mss, pyautogui |
| RL infra | tensorboard, pyzmq |
| Dev tooling | pytest, ruff, mypy, pre-commit |

---

## Key Constants (config.py)

All constants are frozen dataclasses. Import from module-level singletons:

```python
from zh_copilot.config import ENGINE, AGENT, STATE, MODEL, TRAINING
```

Critical values:
- `ENGINE.logic_fps = 30` вҖ” game ticks at 30 fps
- `AGENT.decisions_per_second = 3` вҖ” model acts every 10 ticks
- `STATE.spatial_resolution = 128` вҖ” map grid size
- `STATE.spatial_channels = 40` вҖ” CNN input channels
- `STATE.max_entities = 1024` вҖ” Transformer input cap
- `MODEL.num_action_types = 21` вҖ” action head output size
- `MODEL.spatial_action_resolution = 64` вҖ” spatial head output size
- `MODEL.num_strategy_archetypes = 20` вҖ” strategy encoder clusters

Never hardcode these values in model or training code вҖ” always reference config.

---

## Architecture (AI Model)

```
SpatialEncoder (CNN, 128Г—128Г—40)  в”Җв”җ
EntityEncoder  (Transformer 8L8H) в”Җв”јв”Җв–ә FusionLayer в”Җв–ә LSTM(512) в”Җв–ә ActionDecoder
ScalarEncoder  (MLP, dim=80)      в”Җв”ҳ                                ValueHead
                в–І
         StrategyEncoder (learned archetypes, injected as conditioning)
```

**ActionDecoder outputs:**
1. Action type (softmax, 21 classes)
2. Target pointer (attention over entity list)
3. Spatial position (64Г—64 probability map)

---

## Module Conventions

- **State**: `GameState` and related dataclasses in `state/game_state.py`. Unified representation used by all three input paths (replay parser, headless engine, screen capture).
- **Model**: Each encoder/decoder is its own file. `zh_model.py` assembles them. No logic in `__init__.py`.
- **Training**: `ILTrainer` uses `StratifiedBatchSampler` (group by faction, strategy_label, game_phase; max 40% per stratum). Never use random shuffle for IL.
- **Replay**: Parser outputs command sequences. `message_types.py` is the authoritative action-space mapping (verified against EA source).
- **Config**: Add new hyperparameters to the appropriate frozen dataclass in `config.py`. Do not scatter constants elsewhere.

---

## Development Machines

| Machine | Role |
|---------|------|
| M4 Mac | Python/ML dev вҖ” model, training, replay parsing, data collection |
| Intel Mac | C++ engine build вҖ” headless engine, pybind11 bindings (Phase 1) |

C++ only compiles on Intel Mac. Python-only work runs on M4.

---

## cczh-source-code/ Rules

- **Read-only.** Never edit, commit changes to, or restructure this directory.
- Use it to look up engine internals: data structures, command formats, constants.
- Key paths to know:
  - `GameEngine/` вҖ” core loop, entity management
  - `AI/` вҖ” built-in AI logic
  - `GameNetwork/` вҖ” replay/network protocol

---

## Plans & Docs

- Implementation status: `plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md` вҖ” update `[x]` checkboxes when tasks complete.
- Per-phase detail: `plans/plan-N-*.md` вҖ” read before starting a new phase.
- Design specs: `docs/specs/` вҖ” add `.md` files for new subsystems.
- Diagrams: `docs/diagrams/` вҖ” ASCII or Mermaid, stored as `.md`.
- Use `diagram-skill` for new diagrams, `documentation-skill` for new specs.

---

## Current Phase Status (as of 2026-04-02)

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| 0 вҖ” Project Setup | вң… Done (Intel env pending) |
| 1 вҖ” Headless Engine | в¬ң Not started (Intel Mac required) |
| 2 вҖ” Replay System | вң… Parser done; 35,998 replays scraped; dataset pipeline awaits Phase 1 |
| 3 вҖ” AI Model | вң… Architecture implemented; multi-action head + inference optimization pending |
| 4 вҖ” Imitation Learning | рҹ”„ Pipeline done; evaluation pending Phase 1 |
| 5 вҖ” RL Training | в¬ң Not started |
| 6 вҖ” Deployment | в¬ң Not started |
| 7 вҖ” Copilot UI | в¬ң Not started |

**Active blockers:** Phase 1 (headless engine on Intel Mac) gates Phase 2 dataset pipeline, Phase 4 evaluation, and all of Phase 5+.

---

## Testing

```bash
pytest tests/
```

- Tests live in `tests/`. Mirror source structure (e.g., `test_replay_parser.py`).
- No mocking of data structures that mirror engine state вҖ” test against real `.rep` files when possible.
- Coverage: `pytest --cov=zh_copilot tests/`

---

## Code Style

- **ruff** for linting + formatting (`ruff check`, `ruff format`)
- **mypy** for type checking
- Type-annotate all public functions
- Dataclasses for structured data (not dicts)
- Prefer explicit over implicit вҖ” no magic module-level side effects

## Project

AI bot for C&C Generals Zero Hour. Two modes: **Autopilot** (full autonomous play) and **Copilot** (bot plays, human guides via strategy buttons). Target: 70%+ win rate vs good humans. All three factions (USA, China, GLA).

Deployment: screen capture + keyboard/mouse emulation. No game modification.

---

## Repo Layout

```
zh-copilot/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/zh_copilot/         # Python package (primary language)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ config.py           # Frozen dataclass configs вҖ” single source of truth
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ state/              # Game state abstraction (GameState dataclasses)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ model/              # PyTorch model (CNN + Transformer + LSTM + decoders)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ training/           # IL and RL training pipelines
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ replay/             # .rep file parser + analysis
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/               # Downloader, index, scraper (GameReplays.org)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ engine/             # Python side of headless engine interface (Phase 1)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ deploy/             # Screen capture + input emulation (Phase 6)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/cpp/                # C++ pybind11 bindings ONLY вҖ” minimal C++
в”ңв”Җв”Җ cczh-source-code/       # EA source code вҖ” READ-ONLY reference, never modify
в”ңв”Җв”Җ tests/                  # pytest
в”ңв”Җв”Җ docs/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ specs/              # Design docs (.md)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ diagrams/           # Architecture diagrams (.md, ASCII or Mermaid)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ source-code/        # EA source analysis notes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ plans/                  # Per-phase implementation plans (plan-N-*.md)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ IMPLEMENTATION.md   # Master checklist вҖ” update checkboxes as work completes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ conversations/          # Session logs / research notes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ feedback/               # Retrospectives
в”ңв”Җв”Җ scripts/                # Shell helpers
в””в”Җв”Җ data/                   # Downloaded replays, datasets (gitignored)
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Tech |
|-------|------|
| ML / training | Python 3.11+, PyTorch 2.x |
| Data processing | numpy, h5py, pyarrow, scikit-learn |
| Web scraping | Playwright (async), aiohttp |
| C++ interface | pybind11, CMake |
| Deploy (Phase 6) | ultralytics/YOLOv8, opencv, pytesseract, mss, pyautogui |
| RL infra | tensorboard, pyzmq |
| Dev tooling | pytest, ruff, mypy, pre-commit |

---

## Key Constants (config.py)

All constants are frozen dataclasses. Import from module-level singletons:

```python
from zh_copilot.config import ENGINE, AGENT, STATE, MODEL, TRAINING
```

Critical values:
- `ENGINE.logic_fps = 30` вҖ” game ticks at 30 fps
- `AGENT.decisions_per_second = 3` вҖ” model acts every 10 ticks
- `STATE.spatial_resolution = 128` вҖ” map grid size
- `STATE.spatial_channels = 40` вҖ” CNN input channels
- `STATE.max_entities = 1024` вҖ” Transformer input cap
- `MODEL.num_action_types = 21` вҖ” action head output size
- `MODEL.spatial_action_resolution = 64` вҖ” spatial head output size
- `MODEL.num_strategy_archetypes = 20` вҖ” strategy encoder clusters

Never hardcode these values in model or training code вҖ” always reference config.

---

## Architecture (AI Model)

```
SpatialEncoder (CNN, 128Г—128Г—40)  в”Җв”җ
EntityEncoder  (Transformer 8L8H) в”Җв”јв”Җв–ә FusionLayer в”Җв–ә LSTM(512) в”Җв–ә ActionDecoder
ScalarEncoder  (MLP, dim=80)      в”Җв”ҳ                                ValueHead
                в–І
         StrategyEncoder (learned archetypes, injected as conditioning)
```

**ActionDecoder outputs:**
1. Action type (softmax, 21 classes)
2. Target pointer (attention over entity list)
3. Spatial position (64Г—64 probability map)

---

## Module Conventions

- **State**: `GameState` and related dataclasses in `state/game_state.py`. Unified representation used by all three input paths (replay parser, headless engine, screen capture).
- **Model**: Each encoder/decoder is its own file. `zh_model.py` assembles them. No logic in `__init__.py`.
- **Training**: `ILTrainer` uses `StratifiedBatchSampler` (group by faction, strategy_label, game_phase; max 40% per stratum). Never use random shuffle for IL.
- **Replay**: Parser outputs command sequences. `message_types.py` is the authoritative action-space mapping (verified against EA source).
- **Config**: Add new hyperparameters to the appropriate frozen dataclass in `config.py`. Do not scatter constants elsewhere.

---

## Development Machines

| Machine | Role |
|---------|------|
| M4 Mac | Python/ML dev вҖ” model, training, replay parsing, data collection |
| Intel Mac | C++ engine build вҖ” headless engine, pybind11 bindings (Phase 1) |

C++ only compiles on Intel Mac. Python-only work runs on M4.

---

## cczh-source-code/ Rules

- **Read-only.** Never edit, commit changes to, or restructure this directory.
- Use it to look up engine internals: data structures, command formats, constants.
- Key paths to know:
  - `GameEngine/` вҖ” core loop, entity management
  - `AI/` вҖ” built-in AI logic
  - `GameNetwork/` вҖ” replay/network protocol

---

## Plans & Docs

- Implementation status: `plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md` вҖ” update `[x]` checkboxes when tasks complete.
- Per-phase detail: `plans/plan-N-*.md` вҖ” read before starting a new phase.
- Design specs: `docs/specs/` вҖ” add `.md` files for new subsystems.
- Diagrams: `docs/diagrams/` вҖ” ASCII or Mermaid, stored as `.md`.
- Use `diagram-skill` for new diagrams, `documentation-skill` for new specs.

---

## Current Phase Status (as of 2026-04-02)

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| 0 вҖ” Project Setup | вң… Done (Intel env pending) |
| 1 вҖ” Headless Engine | в¬ң Not started (Intel Mac required) |
| 2 вҖ” Replay System | вң… Parser done; 35,998 replays scraped; dataset pipeline awaits Phase 1 |
| 3 вҖ” AI Model | вң… Architecture implemented; multi-action head + inference optimization pending |
| 4 вҖ” Imitation Learning | рҹ”„ Pipeline done; evaluation pending Phase 1 |
| 5 вҖ” RL Training | в¬ң Not started |
| 6 вҖ” Deployment | в¬ң Not started |
| 7 вҖ” Copilot UI | в¬ң Not started |

**Active blockers:** Phase 1 (headless engine on Intel Mac) gates Phase 2 dataset pipeline, Phase 4 evaluation, and all of Phase 5+.

---

## Testing

```bash
pytest tests/
```

- Tests live in `tests/`. Mirror source structure (e.g., `test_replay_parser.py`).
- No mocking of data structures that mirror engine state вҖ” test against real `.rep` files when possible.
- Coverage: `pytest --cov=zh_copilot tests/`

---

## Code Style

- **ruff** for linting + formatting (`ruff check`, `ruff format`)
- **mypy** for type checking
- Type-annotate all public functions
- Dataclasses for structured data (not dicts)
- Prefer explicit over implicit вҖ” no magic module-level side effects
